item.title: Generating/Expanding your datasets with synthetic data
item.description: Generating/Expanding your datasets with synthetic data, providing implementation details for Synthetic data generation for defects.

item.title: OpenCV G-API: From Imperative to Declarative Pipelines
item.description: OpenCV G-API: From Imperative to Declarative Pipelines, useful for OpenCV industrial inspection pipelines.

item.title: Hands-on Time Series Anomaly Detection using Autoencoders
item.description: Hands-on Time Series Anomaly Detection using Autoencoders, with Python code for anomaly detection.

item.title: Custom Object Detection using YOLOv7
item.description: In this blog, we will embark on a step-by-step exploration of mastering object detection by constructing a custom dataset.

item.title: Computer Vision Blogs: Object Detection with Yolov8 — Train your own custom object detection model
item.description: If you’ve found your way here, chances are you’re struggling with the intricacies of object detection. I promise to you that by the end of…

item.title: Building a High-Speed Deep Autoencoder for HL-LHC Anomaly Detection
item.description: In the world of High Energy Physics (HEP), particularly at CERN’s High-Luminosity Large Hadron Collider (HL-LHC), the sheer volume of data…

item.title: Train YOLO for Object Detection on a Custom Dataset using Python | Towards Data Science
item.description: Learn about Yolov4 and Darknet to train a Custom Object Detector
